message:
chore: sync multi-agent work — perf hardening, TUI polish, stress tests

Includes work from multiple agents:
- backpressure: threshold tuning and signal refinement
- metrics: memory pressure tracking enhancements
- db: cache, retry, stress test, and load bench improvements
- server: TUI chrome, events, keymap, and screen updates
- storage: queue saturation stress tests (br-15dv.9.4)
- tools: reservation index improvements
- beads: close br-10wc epic, br-15dv.9 track, br-10wc.{1,2,10,14}

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
